bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle or a full-screen material pass tinted over the gameplay camera when the Tab preview toggle is active.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_light_path_preview_overlay_1920x1080.png through AssetServer and keep it hidden until the preview toggle is enabled.
runtime_notes: Overlay targets 50 percent transparency so the underlying puzzle remains visible.
Live beam geometry and safe shadow pockets can be composited over this authored frame or masked through it.
The overlay should switch instantly without fade because it functions as an analysis aid.

context.usage: Full-screen Tab-toggle overlay that previews active beams and hazard zones at half opacity to support route planning.

shape.silhouette: Transparent full-screen overlay with beam lanes, impact flares, and darkened shadow pockets reserved for safe-route guidance.

acceptance_criteria: Authored overlay supports 50 percent opacity without obscuring the core silhouette read of the level.
Beam guide lanes and shadow-safe pockets remain visually distinguishable from one another when tinted at runtime.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds puzzle rules, object dimensions, HUD placement, and the Bevy 0.14 technical targets for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra silhouette proportions, eye-glow placement, and cloak-like shadow contours for player and echo scale checks.
